_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-27 14:38:32Z)**_

Now I can see both issues clearly from your screenshot!

**Problem 1: Safari is showing an OLD version**
- Top bar shows "同步练习" (old) instead of "选择/填空" (new)

**Problem 2: 强制跟读 doesn't work in Safari**
- The speech recognition feature relies on **Web Speech API**
- Safari has limited support for this — it's the main reason the microphone doesn't respond

To fix both issues:

**Clear Safari cache:**
1. In Safari menu → **Develop → Empty Caches** (or `Cmd+Option+E`)
2. Then reload the page (`Cmd+R`)

**For 强制跟读 to work properly:**
- It needs **Chrome** — the code even says this internally: Safari's speech recognition is unreliable
- In Chrome, the microphone button and spacebar recording work correctly

**Summary:**
- Use **Chrome** (`http://localhost:8765`) for the full experience including 强制跟读
- Safari can view the app but the microphone/speech recognition won't work reliably there

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-27 14:44:28Z)**_

You're right! Safari on macOS Sonoma can add any website to the Dock as a standalone app — it opens without the browser UI, just like a real app. This is a great idea!

**How to add to Dock:**
1. Open Safari and go to `http://localhost:8765`
2. Click **File** menu → **Add to Dock...**  
   (or click the Share button → Add to Dock)
3. Name it "英语练习" and click **Add**

It will appear in your Dock and open as a standalone window.

**Two things to fix first:**

**1. Clear Safari cache to get the latest version:**
- Safari menu → **Develop → Empty Caches** (`Cmd+Option+E`)
- Then reload (`Cmd+R`)

*(If you don't see the Develop menu: Safari → Settings → Advanced → check "Show features for web developers")*

**2. The 强制跟读 speech issue in Safari:**
- Safari DOES support speech recognition since macOS Sonoma
- The first time you use the microphone, Safari will ask for permission — you must click **Allow**
- If it still doesn't work, it may need the server to run on `https://` instead of `http://` (Safari requires secure connection for microphone)

Want me to set up a simple https local server so the microphone works properly when using it as a Dock app?

     ```jsx
     {activeTab === 'hint' && (

           <Toggle label="🎤 强制跟读（输入前需先朗读句子）" checked={!!s.requireSpeak}
             onChange={v => set({ requireSpeak: v })} />
           <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">开启后，每句练习必须先朗读句子，语音匹配后才能打字作答</div>
         </div>
         <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
     ```

   - `/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/ExerciseView.jsx`
     - Added `speakUnlocked`, `isRecording`, `recResult` state and `recognitionRef`
     - Added useEffect to reset speak state on sentence/key change
     - Added full speaking gate UI before WordInput
     ```jsx
     // New state added:
     const [speakUnlocked, setSpeakUnlocked] = useState(!settings?.requireSpeak)
     const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false)
     const [recResult, setRecResult] = useState('')
     const recognitionRef = useRef(null)

     // Reset effect:
     useEffect(() => {
       setSpeakUnlocked(!settings?.requireSpeak)
       setIsRecording(false)
       setRecResult('')
       if (recognitionRef.current) { recognitionRef.current.stop(); recognitionRef.current = null }
     }, [index, key, settings?.requireSpeak])

     // Speaking gate UI (before WordInput):
     {settings?.requireSpeak && !speakUnlocked && (
       <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 py-8 w-full max-w-sm mx-auto bg-gray-900 rounded-3xl border border-gray-800 shadow-xl px-4">
         <div className="text-base text-gray-400 text-center" style={{ fontFamily: 'monospace' }}>{sentence.en}</div>
         <button onClick={async () => {
           if (isRecording && recognitionRef.current) { recognitionRef.current.stop(); return }
           const SR = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition
           if (!SR) { setSpeakUnlocked(true); return }
           try {
             await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
             const rec = new SR()
             recognitionRef.current = rec
             rec.lang = 'en-US'; rec.interimResults = false; rec.maxAlternatives = 1
             rec.onstart = () => { setIsRecording(true); setRecResult('🎤 正在录音...') }
             rec.onend = () => { setIsRecording(false); recognitionRef.current = null }
             rec.onerror = (e) => { setRecResult(`❌ ${e.error === 'not-allowed' ? '请允许麦克风权限' : e.error}`); setIsRecording(false) }
             rec.onresult = (e) => {
               const t = e.results[0][0].transcript
               const ansW = sentence.en.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g,'').split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean)
               const gotW = t.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g,'').split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean)
               const match = ansW.filter(w => gotW.includes(w)).length / (ansW.length || 1)
               if (match >= 0.5) { setTimeout(() => setSpeakUnlocked(true), 400) }
               else setRecResult(`听到: "${t}" — 再试一次`)
             }
             rec.start()
           } catch { setSpeakUnlocked(true) }
         }}
         className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-lg transition-all ${isRecording ? 'bg-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500'}`}
         >🎤</button>
         <div className="text-sm text-center text-blue-400 min-h-5">{recResult || '点击麦克风或按空格朗读句子'}</div>
         <button onClick={() => setSpeakUnlocked(true)} className="text-xs text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-400 underline">跳过</button>
       </div>
     )}
     {/* WordInput hidden when speak gate active */}
     <div className="w-full min-h-20" style={{ display: settings?.requireSpeak && !speakUnlocked ? 'none' : undefined }}>
     ```

   - `/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/Unit1Flow.jsx`
     - Read to understand existing `requireSpeak`/`FillBlankCard` microphone implementation

     - Spacebar handler uses `window.addEventListener('keydown', handleSpace, true)` (capture phase)
     - `toggleRef` pattern keeps latest function reference without re-registering listener

```text
    71→
    72→const idMap = Object.fromEntries(duolingoData.map(s => [s.id, s]))
    73→
    74→function getLessonData(ids) {
    75→  return ids.map(id => idMap[id]).filter(Boolean)
    76→}
    77→
    78→function getLessonStats(data, progress) {
    79→  const total = data.length
    80→  const attempted = data.filter(s => (progress[`sentence_${s.id}`]?.attempts || 0) > 0).length
    81→  const mastered = data.filter(s => progress[`sentence_${s.id}`]?.status === 'mastered').length
    82→  return { total, attempted, mastered }
    83→}
    84→
    85→function LessonStatusBadge({ attempted, mastered, total }) {
    86→  if (mastered === total && total > 0) return <span className="text-xs text-green-400 bg-green-900/40 border border-green-700/50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">已完成</span>
    87→  if (attempted > 0) return <span className="text-xs text-blue-400 bg-blue-900/40 border border-blue-700/50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">进行中</span>
    88→  return <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">待开始</span>
    89→}
    90→
    91→const UNIT_INFO = {
    92→  1: { name: 'Unit 1', desc: '入门：喜好、职业、问候', color: 'from-green-600 to-green-800', emoji: '🌱', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
    93→  2: { name: 'Unit 2', desc: '基础：日常、购物、天气', color: 'from-blue-600 to-blue-800', emoji: '📘', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
    94→  3: { name: 'Unit 3', desc: '进阶：旅行、比较、过去时', color: 'from-purple-600 to-purple-800', emoji: '🌍', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
    95→}
    96→
    97→export default function Courses({ onImport, changyongData, sampleData, onClose, onSetBack, progress = {} }) {
    98→  const [detail, setDetail] = useState(null) // null | 1 | 2
    99→
   100→  useEffect(() => {
   101→    onSetBack?.(detail ? () => () => setDetail(null) : null)
   102→  }, [detail, onSetBack])
   103→
   104→  if (detail !== null) {
   105→    const info = UNIT_INFO[detail]
   106→    const lessons = DUOLINGO_LESSONS.filter(l => l.unit === detail)
   107→    const allData = lessons.flatMap(l => getLessonData(l.ids))
   108→    const courseStats = getLessonStats(allData, progress)
   109→    const coursePercent = courseStats.total ? Math.round((courseStats.attempted / courseStats.total) * 100) : 0
   110→
   111→    return (
   112→      <div className="w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
   113→        <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-6 flex items-center gap-6">
   114→          <div className="w-24 h-16 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shrink-0">
   115→            <img src={info.cover} alt={info.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
   116→          </div>
   117→          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   118→            <div className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-1">多邻国 · {info.name}</div>
   119→            <div className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-3">{info.desc}</div>
   120→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   121→              <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   122→                <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500" style={{ width: `${coursePercent}%` }} />
   123→              </div>
   124→              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 tabular-nums shrink-0">{courseStats.attempted}/{courseStats.total} 句</span>
   125→            </div>
   126→          </div>
   127→          <button
   128→            onClick={() => onImport(getLessonData(lessons[0].ids), `多邻国 ${info.name} · ${lessons[0].label}`)}
   129→            className="px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-sm transition-colors shrink-0"
   130→          >
   131→            ▶ 开始学习
   132→          </button>
   133→        </div>
   134→
   135→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
   136→          {lessons.map((lesson, i) => {
   137→            const data = getLessonData(lesson.ids)
   138→            const stats = getLessonStats(data, progress)
   139→            const percent = stats.total ? Math.round((stats.attempted / stats.total) * 100) : 0
   140→            return (
   141→              <button
   142→                key={i}
   143→                onClick={() => onImport(data, `多邻国 ${info.name} · ${lesson.label}`)}
   144→                className="text-left bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 transition-colors"
   145→              >
   146→                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
   147→                  <span className="text-white text-sm font-medium">{lesson.label}</span>
   148→                  <LessonStatusBadge {...stats} />
   149→                </div>
   150→                <div className="w-full h-1 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   151→                  <div
   152→                    className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ${stats.mastered === stats.total && stats.total > 0 ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-blue-500'}`}
   153→                    style={{ width: `${percent}%` }}
   154→                  />
   155→                </div>
   156→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500">
   157→                  <span>{stats.attempted}/{stats.total} 句</span>
   158→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-mono">#{i + 1}</span>
   159→                </div>
   160→              </button>
   161→            )
   162→          })}
   163→        </div>
   164→      </div>
   165→    )
   166→  }
   167→
   168→  return (
   169→    <div className="w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
   170→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   171→        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">课程广场</h2>
   172→        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">多邻国课程</span>
   173→      </div>
   174→
   175→      <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-3 uppercase tracking-wider">多邻国课程</div>
   176→      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
   177→        {[1, 2, 3].map(unit => {
   178→          const info = UNIT_INFO[unit]
   179→          const lessons = DUOLINGO_LESSONS.filter(l => l.unit === unit)
   180→          const allData = lessons.flatMap(l => getLessonData(l.ids))
   181→          const stats = getLessonStats(allData, progress)
   182→          const percent = stats.total ? Math.round((stats.attempted / stats.total) * 100) : 0
   183→          return (
   184→            <button
   185→              key={unit}
   186→              onClick={() => setDetail(unit)}
   187→              className="flex flex-col rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-700 hover:border-gray-500 cursor-pointer transition-all text-left"
   188→            >
   189→              <div className="w-full h-28 overflow-hidden">
   190→                <img src={info.cover} alt={info.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
   191→              </div>
   192→              <div className="bg-gray-900 p-3 flex flex-col gap-1">
   193→                <div className="text-sm font-medium text-white">多邻国 · {info.name}</div>
   194→                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 truncate">{info.desc}</div>
   195→                <div className="w-full h-1 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-1">
   196→                  <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500" style={{ width: `${percent}%` }} />
   197→                </div>
   198→                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">{lessons.length} 课 · {percent}%</div>
   199→              </div>
   200→            </button>
   201→          )
   202→        })}
   203→      </div>
   204→    </div>
   205→  )
   206→}
   207→
```
